title: Cakes Can Be Eaten Directly│蛋糕可以直接吃
description: The cake can be eaten while in your hand, without having to put it on the ground.│蛋糕拿在手上即可食用，無需放到地上。
body:
# Fnction│功能
1. The cake can be eaten directly when held in the hand. The eating speed and the Hunger Value and Saturation gained after eating are the same as eating a cake placed on the ground. The cake eaten in the hand is the same as eating it on the ground and it will be divided into 7 pieces.│蛋糕拿在手上時可以直接食用，食用速度以及食用後獲得的飢餓值和飽食度與食用放在地上的蛋糕無異。蛋糕拿在手上食用與放在地上食用一樣都會分成7塊吃掉。
2. If you eat a few pieces of the cake while holding it in your hand, a few pieces will be missing when you put it on the ground.│蛋糕拿在手上食用了幾塊，放置在地上時就會缺失幾塊。
3. The cake will fall after being destroyed. The fewer pieces of the cake are missing, the fewer pieces of cake will fall after it is destroyed.│蛋糕被破壞後會掉落，此蛋糕缺失幾塊，破壞後所掉落的蛋糕也就少幾塊。
